basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Program Associate II Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website iitgn.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. or equivalent, B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A. with 2 years experience, B.C.A./B.Sc. with 6 years experience
qualification.details: Program Associate II: M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline. OR B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A. qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience as a software developer/engineer. OR B.C.A./B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 06 years of post-qualification experience as a software developer/engineer. (Note: The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Gandhinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Program Associate II: M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline. OR B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A. qualification or equivalent in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 02 years of post-qualification experience as a software developer/engineer. OR B.C.A./B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 06 years of post-qualification experience as a software developer/engineer. (Note: The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.)

content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Program Associate II position at IIT Gandhinagar is 18th July 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Program Associate II post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Tech./M.S./M.Phil. or equivalent. Alternatively, a B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc./M.C.A. with 2 years of experience, or a B.C.A./B.Sc. with 6 years of experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Program Associate II position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Program Associate II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Program Associate II position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 78,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Program Associate II post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Program Associate II position announced by IIT Gandhinagar in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Associate II recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Program Associate II position at IIT Gandhinagar is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Candidates from all eligible backgrounds can apply online, provided they meet the specified educational and experience criteria.
